name: Emerald Resources Nl
analysis: It is coming off a base, 21% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.5× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$6.3900, stop A$4.6926, target A$7.2600 (0.51:1) — then trail it.
